data.name: FURRY GIRL PUZZLE
data.detailed_description:
NEW OUR FURRY GAME


關於此遊戲



FURRY GIRL PUZZLE - a logical game in which your task is to collect puzzles and open the pictures with furry girls.

You need to collect from the small pictures one big and after you may to going at the next level.

Admin Mode:

  • R - reload level
  • E - fast open the level if you are in the menu.
  • Q - reset the level to 1.

Features:

  • Simple controls (mouse)
  • Relaxing soundtrack.
  • Beautiful furry girls.
  • 15 lvls.
  • Gallery.
  • 3 modes: easy, normal, hard.
    For changing difficulty mode, in "level choose" screen, press button (puzzle) in the left down side and choose difficulty (easy - green heart, normal - orange heart, hard - red heart)
  • 2 modes: arts with censored and uncensored (For changing modes, press button (18+) in the right down side on "level choose screen")
  • Steam achievements.

Credits:

  • Programming: AFBIK Studio
  • Music and effects: zapsplat

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7,8,10
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz CPU Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 1024 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512 MB
  • 儲存空間: 100 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Use headphones for better experience!
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7,8,10
  • 處理器: Core i3 or higher
  • 記憶體: 4096 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 150 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
  • 備註: Use headphones for better experience!
